task_description: Create a comprehensive Indonesian chemistry textbook on Organic Polymer Chemistry (Kimia Polimer Organik) as a single LaTeX file. The book has 5 chapters covering introduction, types of polymers, polymerization processes, advanced polymer materials, and conclusion, plus front matter and back matter with appendices.

verification.summary: LaTeX document is well-formed: 1778 lines, 91 matched begin/end environments, 5 chapters + front matter + 6 appendices + bibliography with 31 references. Document starts with \documentclass and ends with \end{document}. All content is in Indonesian. Review fixes applied: front matter matches chapters, listoffigures removed, dispersity symbol consistent, bibliography umlauts fixed, natbib removed, coordination polymerization section added, appendix/backmatter ordering corrected.
